name: Least Privilege
description: Limit model, agent, retrieval, and tool permissions to the minimum required for the current user and task.
implementation_guidance: Use scoped service credentials rather than broad user or administrator credentials.
Bind tool access to task-specific authorization checks outside the model.
Separate read, write, external communication, and irreversible operations into distinct permissions.
verification_methods: Inspect tool registry permissions and credential scopes.
Run tests that attempt unnecessary or higher-privilege tool actions.
Confirm denied actions are logged with user, tool, and policy context.
